title: AEMember Collection
description: Array of AEMember records. Each element: An Artifact Evaluation committee member with service history and institutional affiliation.

AEMembership.description: A single AE committee membership record.

role.description: Role on the committee. One of 'chair' or 'member'.
role.title: Role

AEMembership.title: AEMembership

AEMember.description: An Artifact Evaluation committee member with service history and institutional affiliation.

name.description: Full name, e.g. 'Mathias Payer'. May include DBLP disambiguation suffix.
name.title: Name

display_name.description: Human-readable name without disambiguation suffix, e.g. 'Mathias Payer'.
display_name.title: Display Name

total_memberships.description: Total number of AE committee memberships across all conferences and years.
total_memberships.title: Total Memberships

chair_count.description: Number of conference-years served as AE chair (versus regular member).
chair_count.title: Chair Count

conferences.description: List of AE committee memberships, one entry per conference-year served. Each has conference, year, role.
conferences.title: Conferences

years.description: Year (as string key, e.g. '2023') → number of AE memberships that year. Example: {'2023': 5, '2024': 3}.
years.title: Years

area.description: Research area based on conferences served: 'systems', 'security', or 'both' if spanning both.
area.title: Area

first_year.description: Earliest year of AE service, e.g. 2020. Null if unknown.
first_year.title: First Year

last_year.description: Most recent year of AE service, e.g. 2026. Null if unknown.
last_year.title: Last Year

AEMember.title: AEMember
